response.justification: Candidate is a highly experienced senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience, vastly overqualified for an entry-level junior/mid role. Strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React background fits technically, but the seniority mismatch creates significant risk of salary expectations misalignment, retention issues, and dissatisfaction with junior-scope work. Berlin location matches on-site requirement, but no PostgreSQL/Nest.js depth shown and no renewable energy domain exposure.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience across multiple senior roles
Based in Berlin, meeting on-site presence requirement
Broad fullstack background including AWS, Kubernetes, and CI/CD
concerns: Severely overqualified — staff/senior engineer for an entry-level position
High likelihood of compensation mismatch and short tenure
No demonstrated PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience; MongoDB-leaning database background
